commands.name: forge-pi-scan
commands.label: Scan Codebase
commands.description: Trigger a forge-pi codebase scan. Discovers services, dependencies, and secrets across the project tree.

commands.name: forge-pi-build-graph
commands.label: Build Knowledge Graph
commands.description: Fuse code, tickets, and docs into one queryable knowledge graph for the active project.

commands.name: forge-pi-score-idea
commands.label: Score Idea
commands.description: Run an idea through the forge-pi scorer — RAG + LLM + chain-of-thought — and surface the verdict.

commands.name: forge-pi-cluster-voice
commands.label: Cluster Customer Voice
commands.description: Auto-group Zendesk / Jira Service Desk tickets by theme and surface top pain points.

commands.name: forge-pi-market-signals
commands.label: Extract Market Signals
commands.description: Pull from configured sources, extract signals, and match them to the current project.

commands.name: forge-pi-draft-prd
commands.label: Draft PRD
commands.description: Generate a typed PRD draft from an idea, customer cluster, or market signal.
